title: End Cover – [RP]
description: An epic song to the enderdragon fight. [DATAPACK REQUIRED!!]
body:
It's a resourcepack for my Datapack "End Cover", which adds an epic Aria Math cover for the Dragon Bossfight.   **[DATAPACK REQUIRED!]**

DATAPACK – https://modrinth.com/datapack/end-cover-epic-dp


## The ORIGINAL COVER song here:
